request.prompt: Create a polished anime-style chibi OGP card for a shareable X post. Character identity: 動機脚本家 (TREP). This must be the exact same character as the reference chibi, not a redesign. Preserve the same face, hairstyle, outfit, props, and core color palette as the reference chibi. Keep the result cute and chibi-proportioned, but not static, idle, or sticker-like. The generated image itself must include the title typography as part of the final design. Render the exact Japanese title text "動機脚本家". Render the exact type code text "TREP". Keep the spelling, casing, and character order exact. Do not translate, paraphrase, or replace the requested text. Do not translate the Japanese title into English or any other language. The only Latin letters allowed in the image are the exact type code characters. Place the title and type code as integrated editorial typography on the right side of the composition. The typography should feel designed into the image, not pasted on afterward. Gender presentation: female. Age impression: 20代後半. Archetype: 物語を組み立てる感情演出家. Character notes: 人の心の揺れを丁寧に追い、事件全体を一本の物語として語り直す知的な女性。. Outfit and props: ディープブルーのワンピースにライトグレーのロングコート、細いベルト、万年筆。品がありつつ物語性のあるシルエット。. Core palette: deep blue, light gray, silver. Expression: 優しさと洞察が同居する眼差し. Base pose cue from the type data: 胸元でペンを持ち、静かに語り始める姿勢. Supporting visual hints: Character illustration for a murder mystery personality result card. One Japanese female character in her late 20s, story-building dramatist archetype, calm intelligence, gentle eyes. Dusty mauve-brown calm semi-long hair. Deep blue dress, light gray long coat, slim belt, fountain pen. Waist-up composition, soft cinematic lighting, blue and gray themed background, highly detailed, no logo マーダーミステリー診断の結果カード用イラスト。日本人女性キャラクター1人, 20代後半, 感情と物語を組み立てる脚本家タイプ, 落ち着いた知性, やわらかな目元。ダスティモーヴブラウンの落ち着いたセミロング。ディープブルーのワンピース, ライトグレーのロングコート, 細いベルト, 万年筆。上半身構図, 柔らかなシネマティック照明, 青と灰を基調にした背景, 精密描写, ロゴなし. Pose direction (reaction-side): Create a fast sideways reaction with weight shift, asymmetrical shoulders, and a sharp side gaze or hand movement. Favor a side-heavy composition with visible directional flow. Compose exactly one character, large in frame, with a strong diagonal silhouette. Make the pose extremely bold, asymmetrical, and mid-action. Ensure either the torso twist, limb action, or gaze direction clearly suggests motion. Prefer a composition that feels surprising and physically dynamic rather than neat or centered. An unusual camera angle is welcome if readability stays strong. Use a restrained atmospheric background with minimal clutter and clean value separation. Keep the integrated title and type code highly readable at social-card size. Keep the bottom-right corner visually simple and blank. Do not place any text there. Do not add any text other than the exact requested title and type code. Do not add logo, watermark, extra characters, or a plain upright pose. Avoid: multiple characters, childish proportions, overly comedic expression, excessive skin exposure, overly casual modern outfit, low resolution, blurry, logo, watermark, extra props, deformed hands, 複数人, 子供っぽい体型, コミカルすぎる表情, 過度な露出, 現代カジュアルすぎる服装, 低解像度, ぼやけ, ロゴ, 透かし, 余計な小物, 手の崩れ, static standing pose, symmetrical pose, tiny character, unreadable silhouette, redesigned outfit, missing props, cluttered background, extra text beyond the exact requested title and type code, translated title, english headline, subtitle, brand label, caption, wrong spelling in the requested title or type code.
